feature: Weight Unit Toggle (Strength Stats & Body Weight)
user_story: As a subscriber, I want to switch between kg and lbs so that my weight inputs and body weight entries show in my preferred unit.
expected_behaviour: A kg/lbs UnitToggle appears in the BodyWeight component header and is also used in StrengthEditor for weight fields. Selecting a unit in BodyWeight updates the display immediately (local state via useWeightUnit hook). In StrengthEditor the unit is read from the profile. Weight values are always stored as kg; conversion happens at the display/commit boundary. The toggle in BodyWeight is a styled button group; changing unit in the strength editor requires accessing the profile preference.
inventory_notes: In BodyWeight the UnitToggle is visual-only local state; it does not persist to profile (unlike distance unit). In StrengthEditor weight unit comes from the profile.

feature: New Workout Draft Autosave & Restore (New Workout Dialog)
user_story: As a subscriber, I want my in-progress new-workout form to be saved locally so that if I navigate away mid-wizard my work isn't lost.
expected_behaviour: Once the user selects a category (step 0→1), the wizard state is autosaved to localStorage under key NEW_WORKOUT_KEY (debounced 800ms). A flush runs on pagehide / visibilitychange / dialog unmount. On next 'Log workout' open (no presetDate), if a draft exists and cat is set, a 'Unfinished workout from X ago' banner renders with 'Resume' (restores all fields to the saved step/category/date/status/activity/template state) and 'Start fresh' (clears the draft) buttons. On successful create the draft is cleared. Draft is keyed by tenantId.
inventory_notes: Draft restore only offered on generic 'Log workout' open; opens via a calendar day (presetDate) always start fresh. createdRef prevents the unmount flush from re-writing a draft after successful creation.
